behavior_summary: This script provides a minimal 'U8P_WTABLEEW::look' (examine) handler that displays the short description "table " when the player inspects the object.

It also defines a helper process U8P_WTABLEEW::gotHit(uword, word) that acts as a guard-and-update handler for when the item is struck: if the first parameter is false/zero, the helper calls Item::setFrame(0x01, this) to change the item's visual frame (likely to reflect damage or a new visual state).
notable_control_flow: U8P_WTABLEEW::look: single linear flow — emit a single bark ('table ') and then suspend/terminate the U8P_WTABLEEW::look process (high confidence).
U8P_WTABLEEW::gotHit: simple conditional — evaluate first parameter; when it is zero/false, call external Item::setFrame(0x01, this); otherwise do nothing (medium confidence).
open_questions: When and by what engine event is U8P_WTABLEEW::gotHit invoked at runtime (player attack, physics collision, script-driven damage)? (low confidence)
What is the semantic meaning of the second parameter to U8P_WTABLEEW::gotHit (word) — damage amount, attacker id, or unused context? (low confidence)
Does frame 0x01 represent a damaged state, a different variant, or a specific animation frame in the item's sprite sheet? (medium confidence)

main_function.name: U8P_WTABLEEW::look
main_function.purpose: Display a short description when the player examines this item (emit the one-line text "table ").
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine's examine/U8P_WTABLEEW::look event for the item (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_WTABLEEW::look
function_map.role: examine/U8P_WTABLEEW::look handler; presents the object's short description

function_map.name: U8P_WTABLEEW::gotHit
function_map.role: hit handler/guard that conditionally updates the item's display frame

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: engine API to set the item's display frame/index

external_calls.purpose: Set the item's visual frame to index 0x01 for this instance (this) — likely to show damage or a state change.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script provides a minimal 'U8P_WTABLEEW::look' (examine) handler that displays the short description "table " when the player inspects the object.
